title: ARCHIVED - Ontario - 2022 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Ontario - 2022 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Ontario tax Form ON428 - Ontario Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return Optional: Ontario Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  ON428 - Ontario Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Ontario tax

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form ON428 - Ontario Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return
- Optional: Ontario Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  ON428 - Ontario Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Ontario tax
- Ontario Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet  ON428 - Ontario Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Ontario tax
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Ontario Form  ON479 - Ontario Credits Use  this form to calculate your provincial credits to report on your return Worksheet ON479 - Ontario Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Ontario credits Form ON-BEN - Application for the 2023 Ontario Trillium Benefit and Ontario Senior  Homeowners' Property Tax Grant Schedule  ON428–A - Low-income Individuals and Families Tax (LIFT) Credit Schedule  ON479–A - Ontario Childcare Access and Relief from Expenses (CARE) Tax Credit Schedule  ON(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule  ON(S11) - Ontario Tuition and Education Amounts Schedule  ON(S12) - Ontario Seniors' Home Safety Tax Credit

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Form  ON479 - Ontario Credits Use  this form to calculate your provincial credits to report on your return
- Worksheet ON479 - Ontario Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Ontario credits
- Form ON-BEN - Application for the 2023 Ontario Trillium Benefit and Ontario Senior  Homeowners' Property Tax Grant
- Schedule  ON428–A - Low-income Individuals and Families Tax (LIFT) Credit
- Schedule  ON479–A - Ontario Childcare Access and Relief from Expenses (CARE) Tax Credit
- Schedule  ON(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule  ON(S11) - Ontario Tuition and Education Amounts
- Schedule  ON(S12) - Ontario Seniors' Home Safety Tax Credit
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)

- Where to mail your paper T1 return
- Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents
